title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Syntel India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Syntel India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
